export type ActorId = string
export type AdvancedFilterMode = 'inPlace' | 'copyTo'
export type AdvancedFilterOptions = AdvancedFilterInPlaceOptions | AdvancedFilterCopyToOptions
export type AdvancedFilterResult = AdvancedFilterInPlaceResult | AdvancedFilterCopyToResult
export type AgentProposalAcceptResolutionPolicy = 'fastForwardOnly' | 'allowCleanMerge' | 'allowResolvedMerge'
export type AgentProposalAcceptResult = { readonly status: 'fast_forwarded'; readonly proposalId: AgentProposalId; readonly appliedCommitId: WorkbookCommitId; readonly targetRef: VersionMainRefName |  ...
export type AgentProposalId = string & { readonly __brand?: 'AgentProposalId'; }
export type AgentProposalStatus = 'draft' | 'workspace_open' | 'committed' | 'verified' | 'ready_for_review' | 'rejected' | 'stale' | 'superseded' | 'merge_conflicted' | 'failed' | 'applied'
export type CFDataBarAxisPosition = 'automatic' | 'midpoint' | 'none'
export type CFIconSetName = '3Arrows' | '3ArrowsGray' | '3Flags' | '3TrafficLights1' | '3TrafficLights2' | '3Signs' | '3Symbols' | '3Symbols2' | '3Stars' | '3Triangles' | '4Arrows' | '4ArrowsGray' | ' ...
export type CFOperator = 'greaterThan' | 'lessThan' | 'greaterThanOrEqual' | 'lessThanOrEqual' | 'equal' | 'notEqual' | 'between' | 'notBetween'
export type CFRule = CFCellValueRule | CFFormulaRule | CFColorScaleRule | CFDataBarRule | CFIconSetRule | CFTop10Rule | CFAboveAverageRule | CFDuplicateValuesRule | CFContainsTextRule | CFContainsBlan ...
export type CFRuleInput = Omit<CFRule, 'id' | 'priority'>
export type CFRuleType = 'cellValue' | 'formula' | 'colorScale' | 'dataBar' | 'iconSet' | 'top10' | 'aboveAverage' | 'duplicateValues' | 'containsText' | 'containsBlanks' | 'containsErrors' | 'timePer ...
export type CFTextOperator = 'contains' | 'notContains' | 'beginsWith' | 'endsWith'
export type CFValueType = 'min' | 'max' | 'percent' | 'percentile' | 'number' | 'formula'
export type CellStyleSource = 'all' | 'builtIn' | 'custom'
export type CellValue = CellValuePrimitive | CellError
export type ChangeOrigin = 'direct' | 'cascade' | 'remote'
export type ChartAxisDescription = ResolvedChartSpecSnapshot['resolved']['axes']
export type ChartCoreMutationReceipt = ChartAddReceipt | ChartUpdateReceipt | ChartRemoveReceipt | ChartDuplicateReceipt | ChartActivateReceipt
export type ChartExportOptionsSnapshot = { readonly kind: 'vector'; readonly format: 'svg'; readonly width: number; readonly height: number; readonly backgroundColor: string; readonly fittingMode: Ima ...
export type ChartMutationReceipt = ChartCoreMutationReceipt | ChartSeriesMutationReceipt
export type ChartMutationReceiptKind = 'chart.series.add' | 'chart.series.update' | 'chart.series.remove' | 'chart.series.reorder' | 'chart.series.setValues' | 'chart.series.setCategories' | 'chart.se ...
export type ChartReadMaterialization = 'available' | 'sheet' | 'complete'
export type ChartSeriesDimension = 'categories' | 'values' | 'bubbleSizes'
export type ChartSourceData = ResolvedChartSpecSnapshot['resolved']['ranges']
export type ChartSourceRangeKind = 'dataRange' | 'categoryRange' | 'seriesRange' | 'seriesName' | 'seriesValues' | 'seriesCategories' | 'seriesBubbleSizes'
export type ChartType = 'bar' | 'column' | 'line' | 'area' | 'pie' | 'doughnut' | 'scatter' | 'bubble' | 'combo' | 'radar' | 'stock' | 'funnel' | 'waterfall' | 'surface' | 'surface3d' | 'ofPie' | 'bar ...
export type CheckErrorsOptions = ValidateWorkbookOptions
export type CheckoutVersionResult = Extract<VersionCheckoutResult, { readonly status: 'success'; }>
export type ClearApplyTo = 'all' | 'contents' | 'formats' | 'hyperlinks'
export type CommentContentType = 'plain' | 'mention'
export type CommentReceipt = CommentAddReceipt | CommentUpdateReceipt | CommentRemoveReceipt
export type CommentType = 'note' | 'threadedComment'

export type DatePeriod = 'yesterday' | 'today' | 'tomorrow' | 'last7Days' | 'lastWeek' | 'thisWeek' | 'nextWeek' | 'lastMonth' | 'thisMonth' | 'nextMonth' | 'lastQuarter' | 'thisQuarter' | 'nextQuarte ...
export type DocumentId = string
export type EquationStyleConfig = Partial<EquationStyle>
export type EventByType<T extends SpreadsheetEventType> = Extract<SpreadsheetEvent, { type: T; }>
export type EventHandler<T = InternalSpreadsheetEvent> = (event: T) => void
export type FilterCompactListScope = 'available' | FilterListScope
export type FilterDropdownColumnType = 'number' | 'text' | 'date' | 'mixed'
export type FilterKind = 'autoFilter' | 'tableFilter' | 'advancedFilter'
export type FilterListScope = 'sheetLocal' | 'complete'
export type FilterMutationKind = 'filter.columnFilter.set' | 'filter.dynamicFilter.apply' | 'filter.columnFilter.clear' | 'filter.criteria.clearAll' | 'filter.apply' | 'filter.reapply'
export type FilterMutationStatus = 'applied' | 'noOp' | 'unsupported' | 'failed'
export type FindCellsInclude = 'value' | 'formula' | 'formatted' | 'format'
export type FindCellsValueType = RangeValueType | 'empty' | 'string' | 'number' | 'boolean' | 'error'
export type FindInRangeOptions = Omit<SearchOptions, 'range'>
export type FloatingObjectDeleteReceipt = FloatingObjectRemoveReceipt
export type FloatingObjectHandleMutationReceipt<THandle extends object> = FloatingObjectMutationReceipt & THandle & { readonly handle: THandle; }

export type PivotCreationLifecycle = 'defineOnly' | 'materialize'

export type TableSchemaChangeHandler = (event: TableSchemaChangeEvent) => void

export type EnterKeyDirection = 'down' | 'right' | 'up' | 'left' | 'none'

export type HfImagePosition = 'leftHeader' | 'centerHeader' | 'rightHeader' | 'leftFooter' | 'centerFooter' | 'rightFooter'
export type NumberFormatType = 'general' | 'number' | 'currency' | 'accounting' | 'date' | 'time' | 'percentage' | 'fraction' | 'scientific' | 'text' | 'special' | 'custom'
export type PageOrientation = 'portrait' | 'landscape'
export type PaperSize = 'letter' | 'legal' | 'a4' | 'a3' | 'custom'
export type PatternType = 'none' | 'solid' | 'darkGray' | 'mediumGray' | 'lightGray' | 'gray125' | 'gray0625' | 'darkHorizontal' | 'darkVertical' | 'darkDown' | 'darkUp' | 'darkGrid' | 'darkTrellis' | ...
export type PayloadEncoding = 'None' | 'F64Le' | 'I64Le' | 'MixedCbor'
export type RangeAnchor = { Elastic: { startRow: string; endRow: string; startCol: string; endCol: string; }; } | { Strict: { rowIds: string[]; colIds: string[]; }; }
export type RangeId = string & { readonly [__rangeId]: true; }
export type ResolvedCellFormat = { [K in keyof CellFormat]-?: CellFormat[K] | null; }
export type RowAxisIdentityRef = AxisIdentityRef<string>
export type SheetPrintSettings = PrintSettings
export type StyleCategory = 'good-bad-neutral' | 'data-model' | 'titles-headings' | 'themed' | 'number-format' | 'custom'
export type WorkbookSettingsPatch = Omit<Partial<WorkbookSettings>, 'automaticConversionPolicy'> & { automaticConversionPolicy?: AutomaticConversionPolicyPatch; }
export type { SheetId }
export { sheetId }

export type HfImagePosition = 'leftHeader' | 'centerHeader' | 'rightHeader' | 'leftFooter' | 'centerFooter' | 'rightFooter'

export type PaperSize = 'letter' | 'legal' | 'a4' | 'a3' | 'custom'
export type PatternType = 'none' | 'solid' | 'darkGray' | 'mediumGray' | 'lightGray' | 'gray125' | 'gray0625' | 'darkHorizontal' | 'darkVertical' | 'darkDown' | 'darkUp' | 'darkGrid' | 'darkTrellis' | ...
export type PayloadEncoding = 'None' | 'F64Le' | 'I64Le' | 'MixedCbor'
export type PrimitiveSchemaType = 'string' | 'number' | 'boolean' | 'date' | 'null'

export type RangeAnchor = { Elastic: { startRow: string; endRow: string; startCol: string; endCol: string; }; } | { Strict: { rowIds: string[]; colIds: string[]; }; }
export type RangeId = string & { readonly [__rangeId]: true; }
export type ResolvedCellFormat = { [K in keyof CellFormat]-?: CellFormat[K] | null; }
export type Result<T, E = string> = { readonly ok: true; readonly value: T; } | { readonly ok: false; readonly error: E; }
export type RichText = RichTextSegment[]
export type RowAxisIdentityRef = AxisIdentityRef<string>
export type RowId = string & { readonly [__rowId]: true; }
export type SemanticSchemaType = 'currency' | 'percentage' | 'integer' | 'email' | 'url' | 'phone' | 'time'
export type SheetPrintSettings = PrintSettings
export type SpecialSchemaType = 'distribution' | 'any'
export type SpillErrorReason = 'blocked' | 'merged' | 'cross_sheet' | 'bounds_overflow' | 'table_overlap' | 'array_overlap'
export type StructureChangeSource = 'user' | 'import' | 'api' | 'remote' | 'system'
export type StyleCategory = 'good-bad-neutral' | 'data-model' | 'titles-headings' | 'themed' | 'number-format' | 'custom'
export type TestingEvent = TestsCompletedEvent | AssertionFailedEvent | AssertionChangedEvent
export type ValidationErrorCode = (typeof ValidationErrorCodes)[keyof typeof ValidationErrorCodes]
export type ValidationSeverity = 'error' | 'warning' | 'info'
export type WorkbookSettingsPatch = Omit<Partial<WorkbookSettings>, 'automaticConversionPolicy'> & { automaticConversionPolicy?: AutomaticConversionPolicyPatch; }
export type { SheetId }
export { sheetId }

export interface DistributionConfig { /** Type of probability distribution */ type: DistributionType; /** Distribution parameters (mean, stddev, min, max, etc.) */ params: Record<string, number>; }

export interface SchemaConstraints { /** Whether the cell must have a value */ required?: boolean; /** Whether blank/empty values are allowed (default: true for data validation) */ allowBlank?: boolea ...

export type CellSchemaType = PrimitiveSchemaType | SemanticSchemaType | EntitySchemaType | SpecialSchemaType
export type DistributionType = 'normal' | 'uniform' | 'triangular' | 'lognormal' | 'beta' | 'exponential'
export type EnforcementLevel = 'none' | 'info' | 'warning' | 'strict'
export type EntitySchemaType = 'company' | 'person' | 'stock' | 'location'
export type PrimitiveSchemaType = 'string' | 'number' | 'boolean' | 'date' | 'null'
export type SemanticSchemaType = 'currency' | 'percentage' | 'integer' | 'email' | 'url' | 'phone' | 'time'
export type SpecialSchemaType = 'distribution' | 'any'
export type ValidationErrorCode = (typeof ValidationErrorCodes)[keyof typeof ValidationErrorCodes]
export type ValidationSeverity = 'error' | 'warning' | 'info'

export interface DiffEntry { /** Cell with difference */ cell: CellRef; /** Domain where difference was detected */ domain: DiagnosticDomainName; /** Property name */ property: string; /** Value from  ...
export interface DocumentDiff { /** Properties that differ between source and stored */ modified: DiffEntry[]; /** Properties in source but missing in stored */ missing: DiffEntry[]; /** Properties in ...
export interface PropertyResolution<T = unknown> { /** Property name (e.g., 'backgroundColor') */ property: string; /** Resolved value */ value: T; /** Where this value came from */ source: Resolution ...
export interface StyleDiagnostics { /** * Trace a single cell's style resolution. * Returns complete trace including source, stored, and computed data. * * @param cell - Cell coordinates or A1 referen ...
export interface StyleMismatch { /** Cell with mismatch */ cell: CellCoord; /** Format property with mismatch */ property: keyof CellFormat; /** Value from XLSX */ xlsxValue: unknown; /** Value stored ...
export interface StyleSource { /** XLSX style index (xf record reference) */ styleIndex: number | null; /** Fill properties from XLSX */ fill: { /** XLSX fill ID (cellXfs index) */ fillId: number | nu ...
export interface StyleStored { /** Cell-level format */ cell: { /** Stable cell identity (null if transient) */ cellId: string | null; /** Cell format (null if no cell-level format) */ format: CellFor ...
export interface ValidationResult { /** Overall validation status */ valid: boolean; /** Issue count by severity */ issueCount: { error: number; warning: number; info: number; }; /** All issues (flat  ...
export type DiagnosticDomainName = 'style' | 'formula' | 'value' | 'validation' | 'conditionalFormat' | 'namedRange' | 'table' | 'pivot' | 'floating-object'
export type DiagnosticSeverity = 'error' | 'warning' | 'info'
export type ResolutionSource = 'cell' | 'row' | 'col' | 'table' | 'conditionalFormat' | 'default' | 'computed'
export type StyleComputed = CellFormat
export type StyleTrace = DiagnosticTrace<StyleSource, StyleStored, StyleComputed>

export type CellEditorType = 'text' | 'dropdown' | 'date' | 'time' | 'color' | 'checkbox' | 'slider' | 'calculator'
export type DragMode = 'move' | 'copy'
export type FormControl = CheckboxControl | ButtonControl | ComboBoxControl | ListBoxControl | ScrollBarControl | SliderControl | SpinnerControl
export type FormControlAny = CheckboxControl | ButtonControl | ComboBoxControl | ListBoxControl | RadioButtonControl | ScrollBarControl | SliderControl | SpinnerControl
export type FormControlType = 'checkbox' | 'button' | 'comboBox' | 'listBox' | 'radioButton' | 'scrollBar' | 'slider' | 'spinner'
export type HeaderResizeType = 'column' | 'row'

export interface FilePermission { /** * The app that was granted this permission. */ appId: AppId; /** * The path that was granted access to. * Can be a file or directory. */ path: FilePath | DirPath; ...

export interface MkdirOptions { /** * Create parent directories if they don't exist. * @default false */ recursive?: boolean; }
export interface RmdirOptions { /** * Remove directory contents recursively. * @default false */ recursive?: boolean; }
export interface SandboxConfig { /** * Root path for the sandbox. * All paths will be relative to this unless explicitly allowed. * * @example '~/.spreadsheet-os/apps/com.example.my-app' */ rootPath:  ...
export interface WatchCreateEvent { type: 'create'; path: FilePath | DirPath; }
export interface WatchDeleteEvent { type: 'delete'; path: FilePath | DirPath; }
export interface WatchModifyEvent { type: 'modify'; path: FilePath; }
export interface WatchRenameEvent { type: 'rename'; oldPath: FilePath | DirPath; newPath: FilePath | DirPath; }
export type AccessLevel = 'read' | 'write' | 'read-write'
export type AnyPath = FilePath | DirPath
export type AppId = string & { readonly [AppIdBrand]: never; }
export type DirPath = string & { readonly [DirPathBrand]: never; }
export type FilePath = string & { readonly [FilePathBrand]: never; }
export type Unsubscribe = () => void
export type WatchCallback = (event: WatchEvent) => void
export type WatchEvent = WatchCreateEvent | WatchModifyEvent | WatchDeleteEvent | WatchRenameEvent

export type SeriesType = 'auto' | 'copy' | 'linear' | 'growth' | 'date'

export type CalcMode = 'auto' | 'autoNoTable' | 'manual'
export type CallableDisposable = (() => void) & IDisposable
export type CellId = string & { readonly [__cellId]: true; }
export type CellRawValue = CellValuePrimitive | RichText
export type CellTextContent = string | RichText
export type CellValue = CellValuePrimitive | CellError
export type CellValuePrimitive = string | number | boolean | null
export type ColAxisIdentityRef = AxisIdentityRef<string>
export type ColId = string & { readonly [__colId]: true; }
export type CopyType = 'all' | 'formulas' | 'values' | 'formats'
export type DataMatrix<T = CellValue> = T[][]
export type DetectedDataType = 'string' | 'number' | 'date' | 'boolean' | 'empty' | 'error'
export type EnterKeyDirection = 'down' | 'right' | 'up' | 'left' | 'none'
export type ErrorVariant = 'Null' | 'Div0' | 'Value' | 'Ref' | 'Name' | 'Num' | 'Na' | 'GettingData' | 'Spill' | 'Calc' | 'Circ'
export type FormulaA1 = string & { readonly [formulaA1Brand]: true; }
export type FormulaTemplate = string & { readonly [formulaTemplateBrand]: true; }
export type HfImagePosition = 'leftHeader' | 'centerHeader' | 'rightHeader' | 'leftFooter' | 'centerFooter' | 'rightFooter'
export type IdentityFormulaRef = IdentityCellRef | IdentityRangeRef | IdentityRectRangeRef | IdentityFullRowRef | IdentityRowRangeRef | IdentityFullColRef | IdentityColRangeRef
export type NumberFormatType = 'general' | 'number' | 'currency' | 'accounting' | 'date' | 'time' | 'percentage' | 'fraction' | 'scientific' | 'text' | 'special' | 'custom'
export type PageOrientation = 'portrait' | 'landscape'
export type PaperSize = 'letter' | 'legal' | 'a4' | 'a3' | 'custom'
export type PatternType = 'none' | 'solid' | 'darkGray' | 'mediumGray' | 'lightGray' | 'gray125' | 'gray0625' | 'darkHorizontal' | 'darkVertical' | 'darkDown' | 'darkUp' | 'darkGrid' | 'darkTrellis' | ...
export type PayloadEncoding = 'None' | 'F64Le' | 'I64Le' | 'MixedCbor'
export type ProtectedOperation = 'editCell' | 'insertRows' | 'insertColumns' | 'deleteRows' | 'deleteColumns' | 'formatCells' | 'formatRows' | 'formatColumns' | 'sort' | 'filter' | 'editObject'
export type ProtectedWorkbookOperation = 'addSheet' | 'deleteSheet' | 'renameSheet' | 'moveSheet' | 'hideSheet' | 'unhideSheet' | 'copySheet'
export type RangeAnchor = { Elastic: { startRow: string; endRow: string; startCol: string; endCol: string; }; } | { Strict: { rowIds: string[]; colIds: string[]; }; }
export type RangeId = string & { readonly [__rangeId]: true; }
export type ResolvedCellFormat = { [K in keyof CellFormat]-?: CellFormat[K] | null; }
export type Result<T, E = string> = { readonly ok: true; readonly value: T; } | { readonly ok: false; readonly error: E; }
export type RichText = RichTextSegment[]
export type RowAxisIdentityRef = AxisIdentityRef<string>
export type RowId = string & { readonly [__rowId]: true; }
export type SheetPrintSettings = PrintSettings
export type SpillErrorReason = 'blocked' | 'merged' | 'cross_sheet' | 'bounds_overflow' | 'table_overlap' | 'array_overlap'
export type StyleCategory = 'good-bad-neutral' | 'data-model' | 'titles-headings' | 'themed' | 'number-format' | 'custom'
export type WorkbookSettingsPatch = Omit<Partial<WorkbookSettings>, 'automaticConversionPolicy'> & { automaticConversionPolicy?: AutomaticConversionPolicyPatch; }
export type { SheetId }
export { sheetId }

export type RecognitionResult = RecognizedShape | RecognizedText
export type RecognizedShapeType = 'line' | 'rectangle' | 'ellipse' | 'triangle' | 'arrow' | 'star'
export type SelectionMode = 'lasso' | 'rectangle'
export type SerializedPoint = [number, number, number?, number?, number?]
export type ShapeParams = LineShapeParams | RectangleShapeParams | EllipseShapeParams | TriangleShapeParams | ArrowShapeParams | StarShapeParams
export type StrokeId = string & { readonly __brand: 'StrokeId'; }

export interface AffineTransform { a: number; b: number; c: number; d: number; tx: number; ty: number; }
export interface BoundingBox { x: number; y: number; width: number; height: number; }
export interface ClosePath { type: 'Z'; }
export interface CurveTo { type: 'C'; x1: number; y1: number; x2: number; y2: number; x: number; y: number; }
export interface LineTo { type: 'L'; x: number; y: number; }
export interface MoveTo { type: 'M'; x: number; y: number; }
export interface Path { segments: PathSegment[]; closed: boolean; subPaths?: SubPath[]; }
export interface Point2D { x: number; y: number; }
export interface QuadraticTo { type: 'Q'; x1: number; y1: number; x: number; y: number; }
export interface SubPath { segments: PathSegment[]; closed: boolean; }
export interface Vector2D { x: number; y: number; }
export type PathSegment = MoveTo | LineTo | CurveTo | QuadraticTo | ClosePath

export type AutoPromotionTrigger = 'wait_for' | 'sleep' | 'schedule' | 'timeout' | 'explicit'
export type BackoffStrategy = 'fixed' | 'linear' | 'exponential'
export type DeadLetterReason = 'retries_exhausted' | 'non_retryable_error' | 'step_timeout' | 'workflow_timeout' | 'system_error'
export type ErrorCategory = 'serialization' | 'promotion' | 'persistence' | 'trigger' | 'timer' | 'internal'
export type FilterOperator = 'equals' | 'not_equals' | 'contains' | 'starts_with' | 'ends_with' | 'greater_than' | 'greater_than_or_equals' | 'less_than' | 'less_than_or_equals' | 'in' | 'not_in' | 'i ...
export type InstanceErrorType = 'step_failed' | 'step_timeout' | 'wait_timeout' | 'invalid_transition' | 'serialization_error' | 'promotion_failed' | 'system_error'
export type InstanceStatus = 'pending' | 'running' | 'waiting' | 'sleeping' | 'paused' | 'completed' | 'failed' | 'cancelled' | 'dead_letter'
export type JsonSerializable = string | number | boolean | null | JsonSerializable[] | { [key: string]: JsonSerializable; }
export type MigrationFunction = string
export type MigrationStatus = 'pending' | 'in_progress' | 'completed' | 'failed' | 'rolled_back'
export type PromotionErrorType = 'serialization_failed' | 'network_error' | 'cloud_rejected' | 'state_too_large' | 'version_mismatch' | 'timeout'
export type PromotionReason = 'wait_for' | 'sleep' | 'schedule' | 'explicit'
export type PromotionStatus = 'idle' | 'serializing' | 'uploading' | 'confirming' | 'completed' | 'failed'
export type RecordTrigger = RecordCreatedTrigger | RecordUpdatedTrigger | RecordDeletedTrigger
export type RelationTrigger = RelationLinkedTrigger | RelationUnlinkedTrigger
export type StepStatus = 'running' | 'completed' | 'failed' | 'skipped' | 'compensated'
export type TimerType = 'sleep' | 'wait_for' | 'schedule' | 'step_timeout'
export type TriggerConfig = RecordTrigger | CellTrigger | RelationTrigger | ScheduleTrigger | WebhookTrigger | ManualTrigger | SpawnedTrigger
export type TriggerPayload = RecordTriggerPayload | CellTriggerPayload | RelationTriggerPayload | ScheduleTriggerPayload | WebhookTriggerPayload | ManualTriggerPayload | SpawnedTriggerPayload
export type TriggerType = 'record:created' | 'record:updated' | 'record:deleted' | 'cell:changed' | 'relation:linked' | 'relation:unlinked' | 'schedule' | 'webhook' | 'manual' | 'workflow:spawned'
export type VersioningStrategy = 'replace' | 'parallel' | 'migrate'
export type WakeReason = 'sleep_completed' | 'event_received' | 'timeout' | 'manual'
export type WebhookAuth = WebhookAuthNone | WebhookAuthBearer | WebhookAuthApiKey | WebhookAuthHmac
export type WebhookMethod = 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PUT' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE'
export type WorkflowCellValue = string | number | boolean | null | Date
export type WorkflowError = RetryableError | NonRetryableError
export type WorkflowEvent = WorkflowStartedEvent | WorkflowCompletedEvent | WorkflowFailedEvent | WorkflowCancelledEvent | WorkflowPausedEvent | WorkflowResumedEvent | StepStartedEvent | StepCompleted ...
export type WorkflowEventHandler<T extends WorkflowEvent = WorkflowEvent> = (event: T) => void
export type WorkflowEventType = 'workflow:started' | 'workflow:completed' | 'workflow:failed' | 'workflow:cancelled' | 'workflow:paused' | 'workflow:resumed' | 'step:started' | 'step:completed' | 'ste ...
export type WorkflowState = Record<string, JsonSerializable>
export type { RuntimeType }
